subject: Minor glitch in the settings page
description: There is a small cosmetic glitch where the settings page icons are misaligned, minor issue only.

subject: Steps to reproduce a data export bug
description: Steps to reproduce: open reports, click export, the file is corrupted every time, a clear defect.

subject: Regression in the checkout flow
description: We found a regression after the last release, steps to reproduce are in the attached video, blocking release.

subject: Overcharged on my last invoice
description: I was overcharged on my latest invoice and would like a refund for the extra billing amount.

subject: Subscription payment failed
description: My subscription payment failed but the charge still appears on my credit card statement, please check billing asap.

subject: Question about refund policy
description: I would like to understand your refund policy before requesting one for a recent charge.

subject: Feature request: dark mode
description: It would be nice to have a dark mode option added to the dashboard, just a suggestion for a future release.

subject: Please add bulk export enhancement
description: Could you add an enhancement to export multiple reports at once, this is a minor suggestion.

subject: General question about pricing tiers
description: I have a general question about the differences between your pricing tiers before I decide.

subject: Production down for our organization
description: Our production environment is down for all users, this is a critical outage affecting the whole team.

subject: Security concern with shared links
description: I noticed a security issue where shared links do not expire, this seems critical and important to fix.

subject: Blocking issue before our launch
description: We have a blocking issue that is important to resolve before our launch tomorrow, please treat as asap.

subject: Suggestion for onboarding emails
description: Just a small suggestion about the onboarding email wording, nothing urgent, purely cosmetic.

subject: Can't access my account after password reset
description: I reset my password yesterday but now I can't access my account at all, this is critical for my team.

subject: Two-factor authentication not sending codes
description: My 2fa app is not receiving codes and I am completely locked out, security is a concern here.

subject: Forgot password, need to sign in
description: I forgot my password and the reset link is not arriving, please help me log in again.

subject: App crashes on startup
description: The mobile app crashes every time I open it, this error happens on every launch.

subject: Dashboard throwing an error
description: The dashboard shows a generic error and freezes, it is quite important that this gets fixed.

subject: Minor glitch in the settings page
description: There is a small cosmetic glitch where the settings page icons are misaligned, minor issue only.

subject: Steps to reproduce a data export bug
description: Steps to reproduce: open reports, click export, the file is corrupted every time, a clear defect.
